title: ArtisticMemery
description: A mod to adds memes into painting in your world !
body: Artistic Memery is a mod that adds your favorites memes into Minecraft to decorate your house with beautiful paintings like the rock, or anything else ! Please note that this mod is in WIP (Work In Progress) and can change in the futur.          FoudreTeam Website : https://foudreteam.wixsite.com/foudreteam Discord of FoudreTeam : https://discord.gg/szVaUwdQjF if you have any suggestion of memes you can contact us on discord (in the support)
